title: A Clash of Kings (Please let TWOW come out soon)
creator: George RR Martin
thoughts: God I love these books. for the love of god let TWOW come out soon.

title: Stranger Things S5 Pt. 2
thoughts: Eesh… so much of this section felt unnecessary. Like the stakes are too high, and the characters too many, for this to be able to be cohesive at all. The will coming out scene and the Nancy/Jonathan un-proposal were the only redeeming bits imo.

title: Stranger Things S5 Pt. 1
thoughts: I knew they couldn’t pull it off so I lowered my expectations by quite a bit and that seemed to help. It’s just nice to be back.

title: Stranger Things S5 Pt. 3
thoughts: I don’t like the direction this show went in, I won’t deny it. But for the direction they went in, I liked the ending. It was fun, and the epilogue was sweet. Not every ending has to be bittersweet, sometimes it can just be nice.

title: A Storm of Swords (Please let TWOW come out soon)
creator: George RR Martin

title: The Fellowship of The Rings
thoughts: So many people told me this was the perfect movie that I worried I wasn’t going to like it. But I’m surprised. It was a great fantasy romp. A little cringe in places, but the visuals are stunning! That’s what happens when even an old film is made without CGI slop.

title: Elanor Olaphant is Complete Fine
creator: Lee Vinsel
thoughts: DNF roughly 30% in - eh… just not enough into it… we’ll never know if she was completely fine or not. I found her too unlikable for my current mood to finish.

title: Sentimental Value
thoughts: This movie is such a vibe, I was really just digging the Norway feel and the house and the characters. And then suddenly in the last 20 minutes I was crying the entire time. Beautiful story and so well told.

title: A Feast for Crows (Please let TWOW come out soon)
creator: George RR Martin

title: Enshitification
creator: Cory Doctorow
thoughts: Just ran out of time… that’s on me.

title: A Knight of The Seven Kingdoms
thoughts: This was delightful, really! A proper “feel-good” type of show. And it’s amazing to be back in the 7 (8) kingdoms

title: Ready Player One
creator: Ernest Cline
thoughts: Such a good comfort book. Was an another amazing audiobook to listen to while traveling.

title: Project Hail Mary
creator: Andy Weir
thoughts: Such a good feeling book! Was nice to read (listen) to this again during some long drives. Amazing book.

title: The Correspondent
creator: Virginia Evans
thoughts: I bit cliche in the end with everyone (mostly everyone) getting their happy ending. But I love a clever book and this one is clever as all be. I cried at the end.
